title: NHKマイルCの後に・さらに高みへ

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Fuji Kiseki has taken the crowd with her
mesmerizing performance!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When the curtains close on the NHK Mile Cup,
the audience comes alive with conversation, their
hearts completely taken by the miracle they just
witnessed.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member A
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! The crowd's so much more fired up than I
expected them to be! Thank goodness!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Fan Club Member B
text_block_list.text:
See, I told you! You should never underestimate
Fuji's ability to charm everyone!

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
"So long as we shine, any race we run can be the
best one ever," huh?

text_block_list.name: Dark-haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
...I guess I can watch how she does for a little
longer.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Phew! It looks like everyone had a good time.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: More importantly, she came, and she looked pretty pleased. That's a relief.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
But it's still not enough to fully open the path I
want to follow.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
What I'm going for is a path full of powerful
emotions!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I want a path brimming with competition so fierce
it'll take people's breath away, with twists and
turns that will shock all and a heart-pounding
climax!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Our next race is the Mile Championship, right,
Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Mile Championship is where the autumn
queen of the mile is crowned—even senior racers
participate. Skipping it isn't an option for those
on the mile tour.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
The best sprinters and milers will be there—it's
going to be incredible.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
And it won't make for a fun race if I'm no match
for them!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I promised to open a path for others. So let's get
even stronger this summer!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, the next race on our schedule is the Mile
Championship.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Our race through the summer toward the Mile
Championship and the strong opponents waiting
there begins now!
